Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nancy M. Conway for plaintiff and moving party: Gregory Porter
Michael K. Tcheng for derendant and opposing party: Chi Siang Tom

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted:
Plaintiff's motion to compel production of documents pursuant to the notice of deposition to Sau Chun Tom Yee is denied as untimely pursuant to CCP 2025.480. Notice Of Motion For Order Reopening Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: NANCY M. CONWAY, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS/MOVING PARTIES, GREGORY PORTER, ELIZABETH PORTER

RULING:
After hearing, tentative adopted as modified. Plaintiff's motion to reopen discovery for the purpose of conducting the depositions of Wilkin Tom and Kenneth Tom is granted. The parties are to meet and confer as to scheduling the depositions at a mutually convenient time. The depositions are to be completed by October 10, 2005. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. MODIFICATION: DEPOSITIONS TO BE COMPLETED BY OCTOBER 21, 2005 UNLESS TRIAL IS CONTINUED. IF CONTINUED, BY NOVEMBER 7, 2005. (610/BEC)
